side_effects.description: Lipohypertrophy - abnormal fat tissue buildup at left-side belly injection site, double the fat tissue compared to right side

protocol_notes: Third cycle of IGF-1 LR3. Typical dosing 100-150mcg daily with 3-month cycles and 3-month breaks. Multiple peptides injected into belly fat consistently over last couple years without adequate site rotation. Resistance to injection plunger at injection site due to scar tissue and lipohypertrophy noted.
